theory.intro: A fraction is another way to write a division. The fraction $\tfrac{a}{b}$ means $a$ wholes shared equally into $b$ parts, which is $a \div b$.
facts: Sharing $a$ items between $b$ people gives each person $\tfrac{a}{b}$.
If $a < b$ the answer is less than $1$; if $a > b$ it is more than $1$.
steps: Divide to find the value (a decimal or a whole number).
Check: a smaller top over a bigger bottom gives less than $1$.
